raw_text:

{
  "claims": [
    "AB 8 strengthens enforcement against intoxicating hemp products.",
    "AB 8 creates a unified regulatory framework for legal hemp and cannabis.",
    "Bad actors have abused the hemp market to sell intoxicating hemp products outside dispensaries.",
    "AB 8 targets the sale of intoxicating hemp with stronger bans on synthetic cannabinoids.",
    "AB 8 restricts hemp products with natural THC for sale by licensed cannabis retailers.",
    "AB 8 grants state and local public health officials greater enforcement authority to seize and destroy illegal hemp products.",
    "AB 8 integrates non-intoxicating hemp cannabinoids like CBD into California’s legal cannabis framework.",
    "AB 8 subjects hemp products containing any level of THC to the cannabis excise tax.",
    "AB 8 aims to generate new revenue for community programs and state enforcement efforts.",
    "The majority of so-called 'hemp' products sold outside the cannabis system are mislabeled and laced with illegal synthetics.",
    "Unregulated synthetic hemp intoxicants are flooding communities."
  ]
